subcodes.first_line: O friends of that Loving Friend, that Sun of Truth, that Most Great Luminary in the heaven of divine mercy, whose rays encompass the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان آن یار مهربان آن آفتاب حقیقت نیر اعظم فلک رحمانیت پرتوش جهانگیر است
subcodes.subjects: @East and West; communication between East and West, @call to action, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
